query:
SELECT COUNT(*) as total, 
MAX(created_at) as ultima_analise,
TIMESTAMPDIFF(MINUTE, MAX(created_at), NOW()) as minutos_atras
FROM sofia_analyses;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 48pPh9xYP94hzUq.root --database 7RQABHEP2Bfkm28njawraw --execute SELECT COUNT(*) as total, 
MAX(created_at) as ultima_analise,
TIMESTAMPDIFF(MINUTE, MAX(created_at), NOW()) as minutos_atras
FROM sofia_analyses;
